summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Métro-Taxi VTC platform with 5 new features: email verification, transfer system, intelligent matching algorithm, ride progress tracking, and virtual cards in admin dashboard. Backend APIs working correctly (94.4% success rate), frontend UI components functioning well.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 403 'Abonnement requis' for users without active subscription
flaky_endpoints.impact: Expected behavior - users need subscription to request rides

passed_tests: User registration returns verification_url for email verification
POST /api/matching/find-drivers returns matched drivers with scores
Admin dashboard shows 3 tabs: Chauffeurs, Usagers, Cartes Virtuelles
User dashboard shows email verification banner for unverified users
Virtual card detail dialog displays comprehensive user information
Admin login and dashboard navigation working correctly
User login and dashboard navigation working correctly
Email verification status API endpoint functional
Virtual cards admin interface fully operational
